title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and push models with a few lines of code.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models for chat, completion and embeddings.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI) with multi-user support, model manager and RAG plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing sync/async APIs and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Conversational TUI for Ollama written in Go—chat, manage models and logs from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot’s UI.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama—chat, complete and embed with idiomatic Ruby.

title: ollama-compose
summary: Production-ready Docker Compose stack adding Open WebUI, Traefik, GPU support and monitoring.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and dependency injection helpers.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat, generate and refactor code using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and PVC support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a CI service for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-models
summary: Curated collection of community Modelfiles for CodeLlama, Vicuna, Zephyr, SQLCoder, etc.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin that adds /ollama slash commands for summarizing blocks and answering queries.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin to generate notes, summaries and brainstorm with Ollama.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot bringing local Ollama models to any server with slash commands.
